# Third-party: mermaid-visual-editor

Vendored (adapted) from:

- **Repository:** https://github.com/saketkattu/mermaid-visual-editor  
- **License:** MIT (see `LICENSE` in this folder)  
- **Copyright:** Mermaid Visual Editor contributors  

Integrated into CheatSheet Studio Process tab as a flowchart drag-and-drop canvas.
Imports rewritten from Next.js `@/` paths to relative; `'use client'` directives removed for Vite.
